title: OmniControl: Control Any Joint at Any Time for Human Motion Generation
abstract: We present a novel approach named OmniControl for incorporating flexible spatial control signals into a text-conditioned human motion generation model based on the diffusion process. Unlike previous methods that can only control the pelvis trajectory, OmniControl can incorporate flexible spatial control signals over different joints at different times with only one model. Specifically, we propose analytic spatial guidance that ensures the generated motion can tightly conform to the input control signals. At the same time, realism guidance is introduced to refine all the joints to generate more coherent motion. Both the spatial and realism guidance are essential and they are highly complementary for balancing control accuracy and motion realism. By combining them, OmniControl generates motions that are realistic, coherent, and consistent with the spatial constraints. Experiments on HumanML3D and KIT-ML datasets show that OmniControl not only achieves significant improvement over state-of-the-art methods on pelvis control but also shows promising results when incorporating the constraints over other joints.
summary:
# 论文总结：OmniControl: Control Any Joint at Any Time for Human Motion Generation

## 1. 核心创新点

提出一个面向文本条件人体动作生成的统一控制框架，使单个 diffusion 模型能够在任意时间对任意关节施加空间约束，而不再局限于 pelvis 轨迹控制。

## 2. 技术创新拆解

- **统一的多关节时序空间控制**：该方法将不同关节、不同时间点的空间控制信号纳入同一生成模型，目标是在一个框架内覆盖 pelvis 及其他关节的灵活控制需求。
- **双重 guidance 的协同设计**：方法结合 analytic spatial guidance 与 realism guidance，前者强调对输入约束的贴合，后者改善全身动作的连贯性与自然性；摘要指出两者对平衡控制准确性和动作真实感具有互补作用。

## 3. 方法论突破

- **新颖性**：相较于以往主要围绕 pelvis 控制的方案，该工作把控制粒度扩展到任意关节与任意时间片，并尝试用单一模型统一处理多种空间约束情形。
- **关键技术**：核心技术是在扩散式人体动作生成过程中引入 analytic spatial guidance 以强化约束满足，再通过 realism guidance 对全身关节进行协调优化，从而兼顾可控性与动作一致性。
- **理论支撑**：摘要未披露形式化理论证明、定理、收敛分析或其他明确理论保证。

## 4. 实验验证

- **主要基准/场景**：摘要说明实验基于 HumanML3D 和 KIT-ML 数据集，并涉及 pelvis 控制及其他关节约束场景；摘要未披露更具体的 benchmark 设置与评测协议。
- **性能提升**：摘要声称该方法在 pelvis control 上相较 state-of-the-art 方法取得显著提升，并在其他关节约束下表现出较好结果；摘要未披露具体 benchmark 数值、提升百分比或详细指标。
- **消融实验**：摘要指出 spatial guidance 与 realism guidance 都是必要且互补的，但摘要未披露具体消融设置、对照项或量化消融结果。

## 5. 局限与启发

- **当前局限**：仅从摘要可知方法强调控制精度与动作真实感的平衡，但摘要未说明在长时序动作、稀疏或冲突控制信号、复杂文本条件下的稳定性，也未披露失败案例。
- **未来方向**：后续值得补充不同关节类型、控制密度、时间跨度和语义复杂度下的更细粒度分析，并给出更完整的实验拆解；这些内容摘要未披露。
- **可迁移性**：摘要表明方法在 HumanML3D 和 KIT-ML 上有效，但其向更多动作域、不同骨架定义或真实交互场景迁移的能力仍需正文实验支持，摘要未提供充分证据。

## 6. 一句话总结

OmniControl 试图在单一文本条件 diffusion 框架中实现任意关节、任意时刻的人体动作空间控制，并通过双重 guidance 同时维护约束一致性与动作自然性。

recognized_fields.title: OmniControl: Control Any Joint at Any Time for Human Motion Generation
recognized_fields.abstract: We present a novel approach named OmniControl for incorporating flexible spatial control signals into a text-conditioned human motion generation model based on the diffusion process. Unlike previous methods that can only control the pelvis trajectory, OmniControl can incorporate flexible spatial control signals over different joints at different times with only one model. Specifically, we propose analytic spatial guidance that ensures the generated motion can tightly conform to the input control signals. At the same time, realism guidance is introduced to refine all the joints to generate more coherent motion. Both the spatial and realism guidance are essential and they are highly complementary for balancing control accuracy and motion realism. By combining them, OmniControl generates motions that are realistic, coherent, and consistent with the spatial constraints. Experiments on HumanML3D and KIT-ML datasets show that OmniControl not only achieves significant improvement over state-of-the-art methods on pelvis control but also shows promising results when incorporating the constraints over other joints.
